title: mentha arvensis f. pumila
intro: Mentha arvensis f. pumila, also known as dwarf pennyroyal, is a compact variety of the mint family, characterized by its small size and distinctive minty aroma. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, making it effective against digestive issues and skin irritations. The health benefits of Mentha arvensis f. pumila include relief from menstrual cramps, improved digestion, and reduced stress levels, while also promoting overall well-being. In herbal preparations, the leaves of Mentha arvensis f. pumila are often used to make teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to treat various health conditions and provide a natural remedy for common ailments.
